title: trigonostemon indicus
intro: Trigonostemon indicus, also known as the Indian dragon plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, characterized by its unique, dragon-like shape and vibrant red and green colors. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trigonostemon indicus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
